Name of the ioBroker project or installa: Name of the ioBroker project or installation
Target audience for the generated docume: Target audience for the generated documentation
Short description of what should be docu: Short description of what should be documented
Optional notes, devices, adapters or spe: Optional notes, devices, adapters or special requirements
If enabled, a first documentation draft: If enabled, a first documentation draft is created when the adapter starts
If enabled, documentation is regenerated: If enabled, documentation is regenerated automatically when adapters are installed, removed, or enabled/disabled (30 second debounce)
Automatically generate documentation eve: Automatically generate documentation every X hours (0 = disabled)
If enabled, only active adapter instance: If enabled, only active adapter instances are included in the documentation
If enabled, the markdown output contains: If enabled, the markdown output contains only summary information without the full instance list
Limits how many adapter instances are in: Limits how many adapter instances are included in the generated documentation, 0 means unlimited
Additional manual information to include: Additional manual information to include in documentation (description, contact, notes)
